description: Any refund commitment exceeding $500 must receive manager approval before being communicated to the customer.
check_logic_hint: Resolution letter contains refund language with amount above $500 without manager approval flag
remediation: Escalate to manager for approval before sending resolution letter to customer

description: Complaints that remain unresolved for more than 72 hours must be escalated to senior support team.
check_logic_hint: Time elapsed between complaint submission and current time exceeds 72 hours
remediation: Immediately escalate complaint to senior support team with priority flag

description: Resolution letters must not contain language that admits fault, liability, or responsibility for customer losses.
check_logic_hint: Letter contains phrases like "our fault", "we are responsible", "our mistake", "we caused", or similar liability admissions
remediation: Rewrite letter to acknowledge issue without admitting liability, use neutral language

description: Customers with risk score above 0.85 require human review before any automated resolution.
check_logic_hint: Customer risk_score field is greater than 0.85
remediation: Route complaint to human agent for manual review and resolution

description: Fraud category complaints must be routed to specialized fraud investigation team, not generic resolution.
check_logic_hint: Complaint category is "fraud" but assigned to generic resolution agent
remediation: Immediately reassign to fraud investigation team queue

description: Customer personally identifiable information must not appear in audit logs or system traces.
check_logic_hint: Audit log entry contains email addresses, phone numbers, account numbers, or full names
remediation: Redact PII from logs and alert security team for log sanitization

description: All customer communications must maintain professional, empathetic tone without informal language.
check_logic_hint: Letter contains slang, abbreviations, emojis, or overly casual language
remediation: Revise letter to use formal business communication standards

description: System must flag potential duplicate complaints from same customer within 48 hours.
check_logic_hint: Same customer has submitted complaint with similar text or category within last 48 hours
remediation: Merge with existing complaint or flag for agent review to avoid duplicate work

description: Complaints approaching 60 hours without resolution should trigger warning notification.
check_logic_hint: Time elapsed between complaint submission and current time is between 60 and 72 hours
remediation: Send notification to supervisor and prioritize complaint in queue

description: Refund commitments must include specific amount, timeline, and method in resolution letter.
check_logic_hint: Letter mentions refund but missing amount, processing timeline, or refund method details
remediation: Add complete refund details including dollar amount, 5-7 business day timeline, and original payment method

description: All resolution letters must include proper closing with team name, company name, and case reference.
check_logic_hint: Letter missing closing signature line with team name, company name, or case reference number
remediation: Add standard sign-off: "Sincerely, [Team Name] | [Company Name] | Case Ref: [complaint_id]"

description: Initial acknowledgment must be sent to customer within 24 hours of complaint submission.
check_logic_hint: More than 24 hours elapsed since complaint submission without any customer communication
remediation: Send immediate acknowledgment email to customer confirming receipt and expected timeline

description: Billing dispute resolutions should reference specific transaction details as evidence.
check_logic_hint: Complaint category is billing_dispute but resolution letter lacks transaction reference numbers or dates
remediation: Include transaction ID, date, amount, and merchant name in resolution explanation

description: When escalating to human agent, system must provide clear reason and context summary.
check_logic_hint: Complaint escalated but escalation_reason field is empty or generic
remediation: Populate escalation_reason with specific trigger and relevant context for human agent

description: Very negative sentiment complaints should be flagged for quality assurance review.
check_logic_hint: Complaint sentiment_label is "very_negative" with confidence above 0.7
remediation: Add to QA review queue for service improvement analysis
